case_title: JAMES R. BETTS JR VS. CHRISTOPHER F. MORALES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, CHRISTOPHER F.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.
RETURNED MAIL (2): NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 6/6/11 TO CHRISTOPHER F. MORALES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BETTS JR, JAMES R. AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, CHRISTOPHER F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTS JR, JAMES R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORALES, CHRISTOPHER F. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
